title: dendranthema × miyatojimense
intro: Dendranthema × miyatojimense, also known as Miyatojima chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dendranthema × miyatojimense include reducing fever, relieving headaches and coughs, and improving digestion. The plant can be prepared into various herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, making it a versatile ingredient in traditional remedies.
